name: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
original_name: The Life & Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson
overview: Nicole Brown Simpson's murder and O.J. Simpson‘s proclaimed innocence have been the subject of scrutiny for years. Now Nicole's sisters Denise, Dominique, and Tanya – and her closest friends — come forward for the first time to share her truth following one of the most notorious crimes and trials in history.

trailers.title: Official Trailer | The Life and Murder of Nicole Brown Simpson | Lifetime
